assertions.title: Help Text - Main Command

steps.action: Run `node apps/cli/bin/fleet.js --help` from the repo root
steps.expected: Main help prints usage text to stdout and exits 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; stdout begins with `Usage: fleet <command> [options]`=True

steps.action: Inspect the commands section in the main help output
steps.expected: All supported subcommands are listed for users.

assertions.reason: The real CLI printed main usage help to stdout with exit code 0 and listed every shipped subcommand.

assertions.title: Help Text - Subcommand Help

steps.expected: Command-specific help prints usage, arguments, and relevant options to stdout with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; confirmed markers=['Usage: fleet status [options]', '--json', '--config, -c <path>']

steps.expected: Command-specific help prints usage, arguments, and relevant options to stdout with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; confirmed markers=['Usage: fleet pull [hosts...] [options]', 'Arguments:', '--repo, -r <path>']

steps.expected: Command-specific help prints usage, arguments, and relevant options to stdout with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; confirmed markers=['Usage: fleet sync <skill> [hosts...] [options]', 'Arguments:', '--local-skill-path, -l <path>']

steps.expected: Command-specific help prints usage, arguments, and relevant options to stdout with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; confirmed markers=['Usage: fleet activate <skill> [hosts...] [options]', 'Arguments:', '--active-dir, -a <path>']

steps.expected: Command-specific help prints usage, arguments, and relevant options to stdout with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; confirmed markers=['Usage: fleet deactivate <skill> [hosts...] [options]', 'Arguments:', '--active-dir, -a <path>']

steps.expected: Command-specific help prints usage, arguments, and relevant options to stdout with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; confirmed markers=['Usage: fleet rollback <ref> [hosts...] [options]', 'Arguments:', '--repo, -r <path>']

steps.expected: Command-specific help prints usage, arguments, and relevant options to stdout with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exitCode=0; stderr='empty'; confirmed markers=['Usage: fleet tag <name> [hosts...] [options]', 'Arguments:', '--repo, -r <path>']

assertions.reason: Representative subcommand help invocations across all shipped commands each returned exit code 0 and documented command-specific usage, arguments, and relevant options.

assertions.title: Usage Error - Missing Required Argument

steps.action: Run `node apps/cli/bin/fleet.js sync` without its required positional argument
steps.expected: CLI exits non-zero and prints an error plus the relevant usage syntax to stderr.
steps.observed: exitCode=1; stdout='empty'; stderr includes placeholder '<skill>'=True and usage hint=True

steps.action: Run `node apps/cli/bin/fleet.js activate` without its required positional argument
steps.expected: CLI exits non-zero and prints an error plus the relevant usage syntax to stderr.
steps.observed: exitCode=1; stdout='empty'; stderr includes placeholder '<skill>'=True and usage hint=True

steps.action: Run `node apps/cli/bin/fleet.js deactivate` without its required positional argument
steps.expected: CLI exits non-zero and prints an error plus the relevant usage syntax to stderr.
steps.observed: exitCode=1; stdout='empty'; stderr includes placeholder '<skill>'=True and usage hint=True

steps.action: Run `node apps/cli/bin/fleet.js rollback` without its required positional argument
steps.expected: CLI exits non-zero and prints an error plus the relevant usage syntax to stderr.
steps.observed: exitCode=1; stdout='empty'; stderr includes placeholder '<ref>'=True and usage hint=True

steps.action: Run `node apps/cli/bin/fleet.js tag` without its required positional argument
steps.expected: CLI exits non-zero and prints an error plus the relevant usage syntax to stderr.
steps.observed: exitCode=1; stdout='empty'; stderr includes placeholder '<name>'=True and usage hint=True

assertions.reason: Each required-argument command returned exit code 1, kept stdout empty, and printed a missing-argument error together with the relevant usage hint on stderr.

assertions.title: Usage Error - Unknown Command

steps.expected: CLI exits non-zero and reports the unknown subcommand on stderr.
steps.observed: exitCode=1; stdout='empty'; stderr contains `Unknown command: frobnicate`=True

steps.action: Inspect the follow-on help text in stderr
steps.expected: The error output includes the valid command list or suggestions.

assertions.reason: The CLI rejected an unknown subcommand with exit code 1, named the bad command, and included the valid command list in stderr.

frictions.description: The tuistory tool was not installed in PATH on this worker, so terminal snapshots could not be captured with that helper.
frictions.resolution: Captured pseudo-terminal transcripts with util-linux `script` instead, while separately saving raw stdout, stderr, and exit-code files for every CLI invocation.

summary: Tested 4 assertions on the real CLI surface: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
